problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: If Bacteriophage surface display for targeting is applied to instability, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
